subject: Re: Last Chance
body:
tell him it's important to me,, , but as he knows I never ask for his help.

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, March 15, 2007 2:20:29 PM
Subject: FW: Last Chance


Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Thursday, March 15, 2007 3:13 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Last Chance

To coach me. I am sitting in his waiting room waiting to be escorted
into his office.
